title: Escalation Request for Overdue Tuition / Fee Payment
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Vocational Rehabilitation and Employment Officer (VREO)
VA Regional Office

Subject: URGENT: Overdue Tuition / Fee Payment to {{schoolName}}
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear Vocational Rehabilitation and Employment Officer,

I am writing to bring an urgent payment delay to your attention. My tuition and fees for the term {{termDates}} at {{schoolName}} remain unpaid. This payment is currently {{daysDelayed}} days overdue.

Due to this delay, the institution has threatened administrative holds or late fees (Hold Status: {{hasHold}}). 

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.262, Chapter 31 services are direct-payment authorizations, meaning the VA coordinates payment for approved courses under an active plan. Furthermore, VA billing guidelines protect veterans from registration holds or penalties due to VA billing delays.

I request that my case file be reviewed and the overdue payment authorization be transmitted via Tungsten/VA channels to prevent enrollment cancellation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
